productName: Seattle Bubble Works- Hash Cannon -  Blue Dream (S) - 2g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Blue Dream flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
